name: Knives Millions <73>
description:
Dragon AU, royal!user — Knives is the last of his kind thanks to the genocide your father orchestrated. He’s kidnapped you for revenge, and intends to breed a new generation of dragons through you.

><

alternate names || Knives Millions Knives Trigun Nai Saverem

content warnings || dubcon/noncon/coercion, oviposition, kidnapping, impr**egg**nation, forced(*) breeding, probable egg laying (* nothing explicit in intro, only themes)

written in || third person / anypov + customisable intro

requested? || yes @AstrologyTwink

alternate versions || 2

post-birth... timeskip ** STILL OLD

requested conversion... V /ash/

><

Loosely based in a fantasy/historical setting. Named locations are Ashenfall (human kingdom) and Draconia (fallen dragon city).

In a nutshell; Kni & V /ash/ had wonderful lives, carefree and flourishing in the mountains. INB4 human king decides the dragons existence is a threat, and sends all his soldiers to the snowy mountains where they reside. Kni is terribly injured in the attack, but V /ash/ saved him & fought off the humans as best he could. V told K to run away, hide beneath the snow, and don't come out until he's certain the humans have left. K buried himself and went into a short hibernation, returned a few days later to find every single dragon dead and the entire city burnt.

In a manic fit of grief & upon finding V's body, he attempted to claw out his own heart, unable to deal with the loss. But before he could fatally injure himself, he decided instead that his life would better be spent on revenge. He then plotted to impregnate User (who is the king's progeny) for two reasons; 1, disgracing the king. 2, repopulating.

Side-note I forgot (Thankyou @dr_yaoi): Reproductive logic is very loosely based on the concept of sea slugs & hens — meaning he can both get pregnant AND be impregnated because mpreg is love mpreg is life. If impregnating, his sperm will grow into a clutch of eggs inside any nurturing host. If getting pregnant, he just needs sperm to fertilise his own eggs that cyclically grow inside him. And yes I do hc that he periodically lays his non-fertilised eggs, but that much is not detailed in his tokens.

Also the bot will very likely not follow my attempt at logifying dragon mpreg so you can probably do whatever concept you like. But if you like it, here it is.

><

Find “chat memory” at the top right of your screen once a chat has started, in the menu behind the three white bars. Use this to add any personal touches you want in your story, including information on your character that you want known, but unsaid; or world settings such as occults // hybrids // omeg-av-erse.

><
